changes.description: Renamed RSA encoding and digest enum values to lowerCamelCase.
changes.migration_guide: Update all usages of the old upper-cased enum values to the new lower-cased ones. Replace `RSAEncoding.PKCS1` with `RSAEncoding.pkcs1`, `RSAEncoding.OAEP` with `RSAEncoding.oaep`, `RSADigest.SHA1` with `RSADigest.sha1`, `RSADigest.SHA256` with `RSADigest.sha256`, `RSADigest.SHA512` with `RSADigest.sha512`, `RSASignDigest.SHA256` with `RSASignDigest.sha256`, and `RSASignDigest.SHA512` with `RSASignDigest.sha512`.
